SMILE INDEX: 76
WINDOW: 1161.667s to 1199.400s (smile at 1181.667s to 1184.400s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1086.150-1198.870] interviewee: evacuated by the Poles. So he took me for a German. He never asked me if I was  a Jew, because at that time at the beginning, there was no Jewish questions. They didn't know-- there was no orders what to do with the Jews. And he said, oh, he welcomed me. And now go back to your hometown. It's already in Germany. And they helped me even with transportation and trucks and cars-- either way. And in a few days, I was already home. We marched 10 days. But maybe two,  three days I was home already.
[1198.870-1228.540] interviewee: The other

back to your hometown. It's already in Germany.

They didn't know-- there was no orders what to do with the Jews. And he said, oh, he welcomed me. And now go back to your hometown. It's already in Germany. And they helped me even with transportation and trucks and cars-- either way. And in a few days, I was already home. We marched 10 days. But maybe two,  three days I was home already.
